message:
fix(newproj): include .gitignore in confirmation screen file tree

The confirmation screen's get_files_to_create() was missing .gitignore
from the preview, even though screen_progress.sh now creates it.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -51,8 +51,9 @@ get_files_to_create() {
         files+=("$project_dir/.ubsignore")
     fi
 
-    # Always create a basic README
+    # Always create a basic README and .gitignore
     files+=("$project_dir/README.md")
+    files+=("$project_dir/.gitignore")
 
     printf '%s\n' "${files[@]}"
 }
